name: pet-context-companion
description: A local cross-platform companion panel for Codex pets, task context, and token usage.

scripts.check: node --check src/codex-data.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/rate-limits.js && node --check src/renderer/renderer.js && node --check plugins/pet-context-companion/scripts/install-and-launch.js
